statement.markdown:
Create a split screen layout with two sections of unequal size.
The left section should take up 40% of the screen and the right section should take up the remaining 60%.
Both sections should be of equal height and have a border of 1px solid black.

gradingCriteria.description: The layout should be responsive and work on all screen sizes.
The CSS structure should be clean and well-organized.
The HTML structure should be clean and well-organized.
